text: Being here, I am drawn into a world of ideas and innovation. The modern architecture and glowing lights create an air of anticipation, as if each space is inviting me to question, to learn. The R + D display feels especially alive—a fusion of art, text, and technology. Reflection turns inward: How do we, as humans, relate to machines, to knowledge, to one another? My curiosity is awakened, tinged with a quiet wonder at the pursuit of understanding in this dynamic space.
